hero.headline: Scaling Revenue Through High-Intent Lead Generation
hero.subheadline: A performance-driven acquisition system built to convert search demand into qualified applications.
hero.description: Ideom partnered with Rent Buy It to transform underperforming paid channels into a structured, high-conversion acquisition engine that scaled consistently across multiple quarters.

overview.audience: Prospective homeowners with limited access to traditional mortgages seeking alternative financing paths
overview.objective: Increase qualified applications while reducing acquisition costs and improving funnel efficiency.
overview.description: Rent Buy It faced high acquisition costs and inconsistent lead quality. Ideom implemented a full-funnel system aligning paid acquisition, qualification, and conversion to drive predictable growth.

performance.summary: A multi-variable performance lift driven by reduced acquisition costs, increased lead volume, and improved conversion efficiency.

items: High cost per lead with inconsistent quality
Low conversion from inquiry to qualified application

items.title: Search Intent Capture
items.description: Rebuilt paid search campaigns around high-intent keywords tied directly to financing urgency.

items.title: Qualification Funnel
items.description: Introduced structured qualification steps to filter low-quality leads before sales interaction.

items.title: Landing Page Optimization
items.description: Simplified pages with clear eligibility criteria, reducing friction and improving application completion rates.

items.title: Conversion Alignment
items.description: Aligned messaging from ad to application flow, ensuring consistency and reducing drop-off.

results.label: Revenue Growth
results.description: Generated through improved acquisition and conversion systems

results.label: Cost Per Lead
results.description: Reduced through targeting and funnel optimization

results.label: Lead Volume
results.description: Scaled qualified lead flow without proportional cost increase

results.label: Conversion Rate
results.description: Improved application completion and qualification rates

deepDive.title: Let's Break Down Some Of The Campaigns

items.name: High-Intent Search Campaign
items.core_message: Struggling to get approved for a mortgage? Start here.
items.structure: Keyword intent → direct solution → qualification CTA
items.psychology: Captures urgency and financial pain point, driving high-intent clicks
items.result: Highest lead quality and conversion rate

items.name: Alternative Financing Campaign
items.core_message: You don’t need perfect credit to own a home
items.psychology: Removes limiting belief and opens new possibility, increasing engagement
items.result: High CTR and strong lead volume

items.name: Qualification Filter Campaign
items.core_message: See if you qualify in minutes
items.structure: Quick qualification hook → low-friction entry → form completion
items.psychology: Reduces friction and commitment anxiety, increasing form starts
items.result: Higher completion rates and improved lead quality

items.description: High-intent search campaigns and belief-shifting social ads capturing demand.
Clear eligibility messaging and simplified flow to encourage application start.
Step-based filtering system to improve lead quality before sales interaction.
Optimized application flow increasing completion and approval rates.

testimonials.quote: Ideom helped us turn traffic into qualified applications at scale. The efficiency gains changed everything.
testimonials.author: Team, Rent Buy It

cta.headline: Turn Demand Into Qualified Leads
cta.subheadline: Build a system that scales efficiently without sacrificing quality.
